subcodes.first_line: O thou who art humble and submissive! Thy letter was received. Thou wert utterly abashed and filled with shame, weary of thine own self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خاضعه خاشعه نامه ات رسید بسیار خجل و شرمسار بودی و از وجود خود بیزار زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @nearness and remoteness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
